title: Mega Showdown: Extra Megas!
description: Adds a group of Mega Evolutions to spice up your variety!
body:
Join the Discord! I post updated on projects there =w=
https://discord.gg/AjC7P8TvgS

Need an afordable Minecraft Server? Kinetic Hosting's got some pretty good deals!
[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/Nzbs37x.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1399)

Welcome to MSD Extra Megas, this mod adds 35 Mega Evolutions (Potentially more megas, and maybe even gigantamax forms in the future ;3) for pokemon that may or may not be your favorites!

Here's some important/helpful info btw: 

It's suggested to use something that adds models for some of the pokemon that don't have them, like the complete cobblemon collection

There's very few models as of right now but I do plan on learning to make models/have other ppl make models, but other than that the mod should work perfectly!

All megas have the Suffix of "E" (for extras" to prevent any problems with other mods that add megas for overlapping species, like mega flygon, so theoretically it should have support for other mods, however this mod was specifically developed with Navas ZA Megas so that's 100% compatible, and with Horret's Megas, and Laser's Fakemon packs in mind and unless I'm wrong they should be compatible? if not please reach out to me in the cobblemon discord server!!!

And also if you use commands/creative mode/any non-crafting method of getting these mega stones you'll need to use this command!
/msd apply mega msdextramegas:*mega name*

Using [Mega Showdown Repolished](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/megashowdown_repolished)? there's a compatability resource pack I made [here](https://modrinth.com/project/msd-repolished-extras)!

Want additional moves to make your mega evolutions better? [try the companion pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mega-showdown-extra-megas-companion-pack)!

(Recipes can be seen in the gallery!)



List of Megas! (and information, sorted by pokedex number, & all spoilered for your convience)
